title: Warsh experiences worst 'Fed day' S&P 500 performance for a new chair since 1994
summary_full: The S&P 500 tumbled more than 1% in Wednesday's session, with losses steepening during Warsh' innagural press conference as chair.
summary_public: The S&P 500 tumbled more than 1% in Wednesday's session, with losses steepening during Warsh' innagural press conference as chair.
